meaning: n.疾病的转折点(或转好或恶化),决定性时刻,危机,危险期,历史上的紧要关头,[医]危象,转换期
examples: At home a crisis was brewing.
The fever has passed its crisis.
It is testament to the depth of a crisis which continues to defy solution.
Those structured products have fallen on hard times as the mortgage sector sinks deeper into crisis.
